name: backend-inscribing-ceremony
description: a collection of services for the backend of inscribing-ceremony

scripts.setup:backend:
cd backend-server && npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && echo '
setup for backend done.
Fine to close the process now. '
scripts.seed:backend: sleep 1 && cd backend-server && npm run seed
scripts.clear:backend: sleep 1 && cd backend-server && npm run clear
scripts.super-start: npm run setup && npm run seed && npm run start
